retrieved_result: Checking File Resolution "Checking File Resolution Making sure that you have the proper resolution of your image is the first step in ensuring that your posters turn out great. There are several ways to measure resolution - some are more confusing than others. The terms \"PPI\" and \"DPI\" are used interchangably - \"pixels\"
